v2_sources.title: Pembrolizumab plus trastuzumab and chemotherapy for HER2-positive gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction adenocarcinoma: interim analyses from the phase 3 KEYNOTE-811 randomised placebo-controlled trial
v2_sources.citation: Pembrolizumab plus trastuzumab and chemotherapy for HER2-positive gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction adenocarcinoma: interim analyses from the phase 3 KEYNOTE-811 randomised placebo-controlled trial. The Lancet. 2023.

boundary_tags.population_or_model: HER2-positive gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction adenocarcinoma patients

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'The study met the prespecified criteria for superiority of pembrolizumab versus placebo for progression-free survival at the second interim analysis.', 'page': 6}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'The study met the prespecified criteria for superiority of pembrolizumab versus placebo for progression-free survival at the second interim analysis.', 'page': 6}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'At third interim analysis, median progression-free survival was 10.0 months (95% CI 8.6-11.7) in pembrolizumab group versus 8.1 months (7.0-8.5) in placebo group (HR 0.73 [0.61-0.87]).',
